## Add Your Signature

Thanks for signing! Please confirm the following:

- [ ] I have added my entry to the table in `signatures.md`
- [ ] My entry follows the existing format with **all four columns** filled in
- [ ] I have placed my entry alphabetically by first name within the table

**Required columns:**

| Column | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|
| Name | Your name or handle | Jane Doe |
| Title / Role | Your job title or role | Senior Linux Engineer |
| Affiliation | Your employer, project, or "Independent" | Red Hat |
| GitHub | Your GitHub profile link | [@janedoe](https://github.com/janedoe) |

**Example entry:**

```
| Jane Doe | Senior Linux Engineer | Red Hat | [@janedoe](https://github.com/janedoe) |
```
